acquisition method: The MS was operated with a top-20 data-dependent acquisition strategy.
alkylation reagent: Protein alkylation was performed with 10 mM chloroacetamide.
alkylation concentration: Protein alkylation was performed with 10 mM chloroacetamide.
cleavage agent: protease LysC (Wako) was added to an enzyme:substrate ratio (E:S) of 1:50.
collision energy: higher-energy collisional dissociation fragmentation (normalized collision energy of 26) of 20 most intense ions.
enrichment method: isolated de novo–synthesized proteins by streptavidin pull-down.
fragmentation method: higher-energy collisional dissociation fragmentation (normalized collision energy of 26).
instrument: to a Q Exactive HF (Thermo Fisher Scientific) MS using a nano-electrospray source.
ionization type: to a Q Exactive HF (Thermo Fisher Scientific) MS using a nano-electrospray source.
labeling: newly synthesized proteins were then purified by streptavidin pull-down and analyzed by MS.
reduction reagent: Protein reduction was performed with 5 mM DTT by incubating 1 h at RT.
reduction concentration: Protein reduction was performed with 5 mM DTT.
